Catalog/Cardiovascular/Myra BMS Bare Metal Stent
❤️ CardiovascularREF: MYB

Myra BMS Bare Metal Stent

TEST_EDITED_BRAND · Coronary Stents

Hybrid cell design bare metal stent with closed cells at proximal and distal ends for ostial scaffolding and open cells at mid segment for flexible navigation. Features latest generation cobalt-chromium alloy L605 with laser bonded tip technology.

MaterialCobalt Chromium L605
Frequently Asked Questions

Hybrid cell design bare metal stent with closed cells at proximal and distal ends for ostial scaffolding and open cells at mid segment for flexible navigation. Features latest generation cobalt-chromium alloy L605 with laser bonded tip technology.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences Pvt. Ltd. and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Myra BMS Bare Metal Stent, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Myra BMS Bare Metal Stent is constructed using Cobalt Chromium L605, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
